description_long: This is a double swing set designed for playgrounds, featuring two orange seats suspended by metal chains from a sturdy wooden frame. The frame consists of four angled wooden legs connected at the top by a horizontal wooden beam, with yellow metal brackets reinforcing the joints. The seats are flat and slightly curved for comfort, and the chains are attached to the beam with metal hooks. The structure is open on all sides, allowing easy access for children to sit and swing. The overall design is simple, functional, and visually appealing, suitable for parks or recreational areas.
description: A double swing set with orange seats, metal chains, and a robust wooden frame reinforced by yellow brackets. The design is open and inviting, ideal for playground use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both orange swing seats hanging from the horizontal beam, with the full width of the frame and all four supporting legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the swing set, with both seats aligned and the angled legs forming a triangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing both swing seats and the supporting frame from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the swing seats and triangular leg arrangement visible from the other side.
